name: timelapse-capture
description: Fire-and-forget visual timelapse capture for long-running app review.

scripts.check: node --check ./src/timelapse-capture.mjs && node --check ./src/cli/index.js && node --check ./src/cli/parser.js && node --check ./src/cli/render.js && node --check ./test/check-script.test.js && node --check ./test/parser.test.js && node --check ./test/render.test.js && node --check ./test/render-cleanup.test.js && node --check ./test/smoke.test.js && node --check ./test/helpers/fake-ffmpeg.js
